hypothesis: Pretraining the hybrid CNN–GRU–attention model on the coarse-grained polymer–surface dataset presented here and fine-tuning it with no more than 10% of the atomistic MD PMF simulations for realistic polymer–SAM systems will predict atomistic binding free energies with a mean absolute error ≤1 kBT, thereby reducing the number of required atomistic simulations by at least 90% compared to training an equivalent model from scratch.
